headline: DaVita Stock Up Following Q1 Earnings & Revenue Beat, Margins Expand
summary: DVA's first-quarter 2026 results benefit from expanding margins and steady dialysis demand across its broad clinic network.

headline: CVS Health Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Stock Up in Pre-Market
summary: CVS beats Q1 estimates as revenues hit $100.43B, margins expand, and 2026 guidance is raised. Shares jump 4.8% in pre-market.

headline: Here's Why Labcorp (LH) Is a Great 'Buy the Bottom' Stock Now
summary: Labcorp (LH) witnesses a hammer chart pattern, indicating support found by the stock after losing some value lately. This coupled with an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean a trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
